{{Infobox starship
| name = Skimmer Drive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is a state-of-the-art propulsion system that resembles a twisted knot of metal tubes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is an object the narrator is attending to.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Skimmer Drive]] is a device that uses [[Aether]] and can fail.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
